zh.lifeSummary: 當William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston於大約1303年出生在英國諾福爾可可爾迪斯頓時，他的父親Roger Kerdeston25歲，母親Maud Bateman27歲。他和Margaret Bacon至少有1個女兒。他去世於1361年8月14日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston于大约1303年出生在英国諾福爾可可爾迪斯頓时，他的父亲Roger Kerdeston25岁，母亲Maud Bateman27岁。他和Margaret Bacon至少有1个女儿。他去世于1361年8月14日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可明日香。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston was born about 1303, in Kerdiston, Norfolk, England, his father, Roger Kerdeston, was 25 and his mother, Maud Bateman, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Margaret Bacon. He died on 14 August 1361, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Langley, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston est né environ 1303, à Kerdiston, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Kerdeston, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud Bateman, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Margaret Bacon. Il est décédé le 14 août 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston um 1303 in Kerdiston, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Kerdeston 25 und seine Mutter Maud Bateman 27. Er hatte mit Margaret Bacon mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. August 1361 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Langley, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston è nato il circa 1303 nel Kerdiston, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Roger Kerdeston, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maud Bateman, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Margaret Bacon. Morì il 14 agosto 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Langley, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdestonが約1303年にイギリスノーフォルクケルディストンで生まれた時，父Roger Kerdestonは25歳，母Maud Batemanは27歳であった。彼はMargaret Baconとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1361年8月14日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston(이)가 대략 1303년 영국 노르폴크 커디스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Kerdeston(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Bateman(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Margaret Bacon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 8월 14일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston nasceu aproximadamente 1303, em Kerdiston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Kerdeston, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud Bateman, tinha 27 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston родился около 1303 г. в местности кирдистон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Kerdeston было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Bateman, 27. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Margaret Bacon. Он умер 14 августа 1361 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия.
